allow: Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -e bash --login -c "which npm && npm --version && node --version")
Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -e bash -c "source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && cd /root/Agricultural-blockchain-traceability-system-backend-/backend && npm install 2>&1")

Bash(wsl -d Ubuntu -e bash -c "source /root/.nvm/nvm.sh && cd /root/Agricultural-blockchain-traceability-system-backend-/backend && node -e ""const b = require\(''bcryptjs''\); console.log\(''bcryptjs ok, version:'', require\(''./node_modules/bcryptjs/package.json''\).version\);""")
